The '''''Green Palace''''' was the name of [[Brasck]]'s [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] ship, a modified [[Lantillian ShipWrights/Legends|Lantillian]] [[GX1 short hauler/Legends|GX1 short hauler]] that always looked as if it had seen better days. Armed with a turret-mounted [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]], a front-mounted [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]], and a [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] launcher, the ''Green Palace'' had been obtained by Brasck from an orbital scrapyard and refitted to meet his needs. Most of the ship's interior was gutted in favor of cramped cells that could transport slaves.
